📐 To'g'ri chiziq va Tekislik tenglamalari

Chiziq: (x,y,z) = P₀ + t·v | Tekislik: Ax + By + Cz + D = 0

📌 3D fazoda to'g'ri chiziq va tekislik tenglamalari, ularning o'zaro joylashuvi

📐 To'g'ri chiziqP₀(0,0,0) + t·(1,2,1)
📐 Tekislikx + 2y + z = 0
🔄 Kesishish nuqtasi(0.00, 0.00, 0.00)
📏 Yo'nalish vektor (v)(1, 2, 1)
⬆️ Normal vektor (n)(1, 2, 1)
P(t) = (0.00, 0.00, 0.00)
🖱️ Aylantirish | Scroll: kattalashtirish
